slide1_h1: Free software for institutions with permanent archives and memorial collections.
slide1_p: Developed to streamline the management of historically significant holdings with technical precision.
slide2_p: Don't waste the legacy of arrangement and description. Move forward with best practices and structural flexibility.
slide3_p: Add digital objects — whether image-based, audio, or audiovisual — with high performance.
slide4_p: Register multiple custodial institutions and assign autonomous teams within a single infrastructure.
sec_caracteristicas_desc: Farinha was built on eight fundamental features that ensure institutional adaptation and access to metadata and holdings.
card_implantacao_desc: Simple and fast installation, with just a few steps to get the system up and running.
card_multiinstitucional_desc: Manage multiple institutions within the same platform, with isolation and security. Describe them using the ISDIAH standard.
card_multisetorial_desc: Structure designed to reflect the organizational complexity of any institution.
card_multiacervos_desc: Fonds described with ISAD(g) and collections with custom metadata, unified in a single digital ecosystem.
card_equipes_desc: Granular permissions that allow each team to manage its own workflow.
card_mapa_desc: Georeferencing of sectors and holdings based on their current custodial location.
card_busca_desc: Advanced search system with weighted rankings, navigation through institutional and arrangement structures, and natural language AI queries (coming soon).
card_opensource_desc: Truly free software, ensuring digital sovereignty and technical sustainability.
sec_objetos_desc: Access digital surrogates of any documentary genre. Textual, audio, audiovisual, and image-based documentary items can be accessed directly on the platform.
card_textuais_desc: Images or formats of textual documents, with planned support for auxiliary layers (transcription, translation, etc.).
card_imageticos_desc: View documentary items in three modes: single side, double-sided (recto and verso), and gallery (multiple images).
card_sonoros_desc: Integrated player for audio documents, such as interview recordings and music.
card_audiovisuais_desc: Integrated video player for viewing audiovisual documents.
sec_equipe_desc: Specialists dedicated to building the next generation of platforms for custodial institutions.
member_ricardo_bio: Holds degrees in Archival Science and Information Science from UFBA, with experience in digital platforms and information technologies applied to permanent archives and memorial collections. Serves as Head of the Northeast Regional Office of the Brazilian National Archives, seconded from UFBA, where he is an archivist. Member of the Digital Humanities Lab (LABHDUFBA) and the Raul Hacker Club.
member_pablo_bio: Developer with over 10 years of experience in web and mobile applications, working across diverse areas, languages, and frameworks. Currently studying cybersecurity, 3D printing and modeling, electronics, and robotics. Member of the Raul Hacker Club.
member_beatriz_bio: Works as an Information Technology Analyst at DATAPREV. Holds a Bachelor's degree in Interdisciplinary Science and Technology from UFBA and is a specialist in Software Engineering.
member_cristian_bio: Project manager and solutions architect. Graduated in Systems Analysis and holds a technologist degree in Systems Development, with a specialization in Cloud Computing. Enthusiast of free software-based solution implementation and 3D printing in the Maker culture.
cta_p1: Farinha is free software. Individuals and institutions can start managing their holdings with Farinha today — just visit our documentation!
cta_p2: Need help? Hire installation, configuration or training services!
sec_contato_desc: Get in touch or follow us on social media.
